parameters.name: active
parameters.label: Active
parameters.description: Turns the Audio Render on or off.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.label: Mode
parameters.description: This menu determines which Steam Audio mode to use.

parameters.name: outputformat
parameters.label: Output Format
parameters.description: The output format of the audio.

parameters.name: attenuation
parameters.label: Enable Attenuation
parameters.description: Attenuate the sound based on the distance between the center position of the listener and a source. The attenuation level is determined by the selected attenuation mode for each source.

parameters.name: ambisonicsorder
parameters.label: Ambisonics Order
parameters.description: Ambisonics order of the output buffer.

parameters.name: mappingtable
parameters.label: Mapping Table
parameters.description: A Table that specifies the various speakers in the setup and their position. The Table must have 3 columns named x, y, z. Each row specifies an individual speaker, and the 3 columns specify its positi

parameters.name: listenerobject
parameters.label: Listener Object COMP
parameters.description: A that represents the listening head. Must be a that contains transform data, such as a Geometry or Camera .

parameters.name: source
parameters.label: Source
parameters.description: Sequence of the audio sources.

parameters.name: source0object
parameters.label: Object COMP
parameters.description: A that represents the source of the sound. Must be a that contains transform data, such as a or .

parameters.name: source0directivity
parameters.label: Enable Directivity
parameters.description: Turns directivity on or off. When disabled, sound will emit from the source from all directions (i.e. omnidirectional)

parameters.name: source0dipoleweight
parameters.label: Dipole Weight
parameters.description: The weight of the dipole to blend in the directivity pattern. 0 = pure omnidirectional, 1 = pure dipole, 0.5 = cardioid directivity pattern.

parameters.name: source0dipolepower
parameters.label: Dipole Power
parameters.description: The sharpness of the dipole. Higher values make the sound direction narrower.

parameters.name: update
parameters.label: Update Meshes
parameters.description: When enabled, any static mesh changes will automatically be updated in the simulation

parameters.name: updatepulse
parameters.label: Update Meshes Pulse
parameters.description: When pulsed, will update the static meshes in the simulation if they changed.

parameters.name: mesh
parameters.label: Mesh
parameters.description: Sequence of static meshes.

parameters.name: mesh0object
parameters.label: Mesh Objects/POPs/SOPs
parameters.description: The object for the mesh which can be geometry , , or . COMPs must contain or geometries in triangle polygon form. The root 's display flag can be off and still be collected. However, child COMPs will

parameters.name: mesh0scatter
parameters.label: Scattering
parameters.description: Scatters sound for reflections. 0 = reflect at the same angle as it hit the surface (i.e. pure specular), 1 = reflect uniformly randomly (i.e. pure diffuse).

parameters.name: airabsorb
parameters.label: Enable Air Absorption
parameters.description: Turns air absorption on or off for all sources. Air absorption is how much sound is lost over the distance travelling from source to listener.

parameters.name: occlusion
parameters.label: Enable Occlusion
parameters.description: Turns raycast occlusion on or off for all meshes. If a single ray from listener to source is occluded, then the source is considered occluded.

parameters.name: numsurfaces
parameters.label: Number of Surfaces
parameters.description: Maximum number of surfaces, starting from closest surface to the listener, whose transmission coefficients will be considered when calculating the total sound transmission.

parameters.name: reflection
parameters.label: Enable Reflection
parameters.description: Turns reflection on or off for all meshes.

parameters.name: diffsamp
parameters.label: Diffuse Samples
parameters.description: Number of directions to generate for reflecting rays.

parameters.name: duration
parameters.label: Duration
parameters.description: Duration in seconds of the impulse responses generated.

parameters.name: refambixord
parameters.label: Ambisonics Order
parameters.description: Ambisonics order of the impulse responses generated.

parameters.name: numrays
parameters.label: Number of Rays
parameters.description: Number of rays to trace from the listener.

parameters.name: numthreads
parameters.label: Number of Threads
parameters.description: Number of threads used for real-time reflection simulations.

parameters.name: numbounces
parameters.label: Number of Bounces
parameters.description: Number of times each ray is reflected off a surface.

parameters.name: irmindist
parameters.label: Irradiance Min Distance
parameters.description: The minimum distance used to calculate how much sound energy reaches a surface from a source.

parameters.name: bake
parameters.label: Bake Reflections
parameters.description: Immediately start baking. Once complete, reflections will automatically used the baked data. Baking status can be monitored using the bake_complete channel in the Info .

parameters.name: probedist
parameters.label: Probes Distance
parameters.description: The spacing between two neighboring probes.

parameters.name: yoffset
parameters.label: Y-Offset from Surface
parameters.description: The height above the surface of a geometry all probes will be generated at.

parameters.name: lstnrdist
parameters.label: Distance from Listener
parameters.description: The maximum distance from the listener where baked data will be stored for probes.

parameters.name: savedur
parameters.label: Save Duration
parameters.description: Duration in seconds of the impulse responses saved at each probe.

parameters.name: batchsize
parameters.label: Batch Size
parameters.description: Number of probes to bake simultaneously.

parameters.name: timeslice
parameters.label: Time Slice
parameters.description: Turning this on forces the channels to be " ".  A is the time between the last cook frame and the current cook frame.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.label: Scope
parameters.description: To determine which channels get affected, some CHOPs use a string on the Common page. See .

parameters.name: srselect
parameters.label: Sample Rate Match
parameters.description: Handle cases where multiple input CHOPs' sample rates are different. When Resampling occurs, the curves are interpolated according to the Interpolation Method Option, or "Linear" if the Interpolate Op

parameters.name: exportmethod
parameters.label: Export Method
parameters.description: This will determine how to connect the channel to the parameter. Refer to the article for more information.

parameters.name: autoexportroot
parameters.label: Export Root
parameters.description: This path points to the root node where all of the paths that exporting by are relative to.

parameters.name: exporttable
parameters.label: Export Table
parameters.description: The used to hold the export information when using the Table Methods (See above).

parameters.name: sizez
parameters.label: Sizez
parameters.description: Size of the spawn box along the X, Y, and Z axes where probes will be generated.

parameters.name: enablebake
parameters.label: Enablebake
parameters.description: Turns baking on or off. Baking is useful as an optimization tool when calculating reflections. Bake pulse must be pressed to start baking. Turning baking off will disable any bakes that are currently

parameters.name: mesh0trans3
parameters.label: Mesh0Trans3
parameters.description: Frequency dependent transmission: 3-band EQ coefficients for transmission. Essentially, how much sound can pass through the static mesh.

parameters.name: originz
parameters.label: Originz
parameters.description: These X,Y, and Z Values determine where the center of the spawn box is located.

parameters.name: mesh0absorb3
parameters.label: Mesh0Absorb3
parameters.description: Frequency dependent absorption: 3-band air absorption coefficients. Essentially, how much sound the static mesh absorbs.

examples.label: Configure Time Slice
examples.description: Common settings from 2 real Derivative examples
